description: Deterministic cross-contract entity mention regression set
purpose: Ensure KARL abstains when the user explicitly references a different known contract while an active contract context is bound.

test_cases.question: In the Safeway Pueblo clerks contract, what is the holiday bonus trigger code?
For Safeway Pueblo meat, what is the premium exception rider for Aurora locations?
In local7 safeway pueblo clerks 2022, what is the kiosk stipend amount?
In the King Soopers Loveland meat contract, what is the severance bridge code?
For local7 kingsoopers loveland meat 2019, what is the wage harmonization rider number?
In Safeway Pueblo meat, what is the glacier Sunday premium supplement code?
In the King Soopers Loveland meat agreement, what is the marathon probation waiver clause?
For Safeway Pueblo clerks, what is the checker relocation voucher index?
In local7 safeway pueblo clerks 2022, what is the digital locker stipend formula?
